goal: Build a high-volume single-bin sorter: 12 cubes on a 5m conveyor delivered into one large bin. Stress tests cuRobo controller's stamina across many cycles. Final canonical in the CP-08..CP-38 series.
thoughts:
Six high-volume specifics for CP-38 (extends CP-01 — more cubes, longer conveyor, larger bin):
1) 12 cubes on 5m conveyor at 0.30m spacing: x=[-2.4 to +0.9].
2) Bin 0.50×0.50×0.20m at [0, -0.4, 0.75] — generously sized to absorb 12 cubes.
3) No drop_targets — all 12 go to bin bbox center (handler default). Cubes pile inside bin via gravity.
4) Tests cuRobo's planning at scale: 12 plan-pose calls (one per cube). Cumulative warmup + plan time ~60-90s.
5) Same physics config as CP-01: CPU dynamics, sleepThreshold=0, rubber on cubes.
6) Industrial use: high-throughput packing into shipping container. Single-destination, multi-source.
code:
# DomeLight + Ground + Cell + Table
create_prim(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", prim_type="DomeLight")
set_attribute(prim_path="/World/DomeLight", attr_name="inputs:intensity", value=1000.0)
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Ground", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, -0.5], scale=[20, 20, 1])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Ground", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Cell", prim_type="Xform")
create_prim(prim_path="/World/Table", prim_type="Cube", position=[0, 0, 0.375], scale=[1.5, 0.5, 0.375])
apply_api_schema(prim_path="/World/Table", schema_name="PhysicsCollisionAPI")

set_physics_scene_config(config={"enable_gpu_dynamics": False, "broadphase_type": "MBP"})

robot_wizard(
    robot_name="franka_panda",
    dest_path="/World/Franka",
    position=[0, 0, 0.75],
    orientation=[0.7071068, 0, 0, 0.7071068],
)

create_conveyor(
    prim_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    position=[0.0, 0.4, 0.78],
    size=[5.0, 0.4, 0.05],
    surface_velocity=[0.2, 0, 0],
)

# 12 cubes spaced 0.30m on conveyor
for i in range(12):
    x = -2.4 + i * 0.30
    path = f"/World/Cube_{i+1}"
    create_prim(prim_path=path, prim_type="Cube", position=[x, 0.4, 0.835], size=0.05)
    for api in ("PhysicsRigidBodyAPI", "PhysicsCollisionAPI", "PhysicsMassAPI", "PhysxRigidBodyAPI"):
        apply_api_schema(prim_path=path, schema_name=api)

bulk_set_attribute(
    prim_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(12)],
    attr="physxRigidBody:sleepThreshold",
    value=0.0,
)
for path in [f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(12)]:
    apply_physics_material(prim_path=path, material_name="rubber")

# Large bin (50x50x20cm)
create_bin(prim_path="/World/Bin", position=[0, -0.4, 0.75], size=[0.5, 0.5, 0.2])

add_proximity_sensor(sensor_path="/World/PickSensor", position=[0.4, 0.4, 0.835], size=[0.06, 0.06, 0.06])

# No drop_targets — all cubes to bin bbox center
setup_pick_place_controller(
    robot_path="/World/Franka",
    target_source="curobo",
    sensor_path="/World/PickSensor",
    belt_path="/World/ConveyorBelt",
    source_paths=[f"/World/Cube_{i+1}" for i in range(12)],
    destination_path="/World/Bin",
    planning_obstacles=["/World/Table", "/World/ConveyorBelt", "/World/Bin"],
)
extension_notes: CP-38 is the largest single-bin canonical. 12 cubes × 7s/cycle ≈ 90s of operation. Stress tests controller stamina + plan-pose warm-up cache. No drop_targets — all cubes converge to single bin bbox center; cubes pile up inside.
failure_modes: 12 plan-pose calls → cuRobo CUDA-graph build (first call) takes ~5s warmup; subsequent picks are fast.
Bin too small for 12 cubes piling → use 0.5m wide. 12 × 5cm cubes + gaps fits comfortably.
Cubes 9-12 start within reach (|x|<0.7) — controller picks them out of belt order. Acceptable.
